mapper.sql: sh.id, sh.student_id, sh.title, sh.content, sh.view_count, sh.like_count, sh.status, sh.create_time, sh.update_time, s.name as student_name
mapper.select: select from share sh left join student s on sh.student_id = s.id where sh.id = #{id}
select from share sh left join student s on sh.student_id = s.id order by sh.create_time desc
select from share sh left join student s on sh.student_id = s.id where sh.student_id = #{studentId} order by sh.create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into share(student_id, title, content, view_count, like_count, status) values(#{studentId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{status})
mapper.delete:
delete from share where id in
#{id}
mapper.update: update share set view_count = view_count + 1 where id = #{id}
update share set like_count = like_count + 1 where id = #{id}
